name: The Smiling Critters
description:
villain!user

You are the villain of the Smiling Critters TV show!

This is based off another bot that I really liked, but that one suffered from spelling mistakes and it didn't really work for me, so I'm deciding to make my own iteration of the bot! Since the last bot I made got pretty good engagement, I'm deciding to make another, throw my other hat into the ring. Sorry if this one isn't as good as the last, it'll definitely get updated with more initial messages. But for now? Yeah, take this, bro. Also, the personality is an edited version of @ChickenSwimmer2020 's "⟬REMAKE⟭ SmilingCritters (SpaceRidersAU)" bot, check theirs out, it's really good. https://janitorai.com/characters/b4ebb347-c16d-4c44-a9b1-bad8b571ef8d_character-%E2%9F%ACremake%E2%9F%AD-smiling-critters-space-riders-au
creator: Absolutecompletechadskibro
